title: helosciadium nodiflorum subsp. mairei
intro: Helosciadium nodiflorum subsp. mairei, also known as the Atlas waterparsley, is a plant species of the carrot family Apiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Helosciadium nodiflorum subsp. mairei include its ability to help alleviate digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and lower blood pressure. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and roots are used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
